channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in intimate garden inside are…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in intimate garden inside arena, guests say reut.rs/4vwTS4h
item.content:encoded: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce wed in intimate garden inside arena, guests say reut.rs/4vwTS4h

item.title: 昨日、父が旅立ちました。 親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし 数年前から病気で入院していて 覚悟はできていましたが …
item.author: puniropi (@puniropi.bsky.social)
item.description:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです
item.content:encoded:
昨日、父が旅立ちました。

親との別れは誰にでも訪れることですし
数年前から病気で入院していて
覚悟はできていましたが
やはり落ち込むものです

先月に会い行った時は
もう喋れなくなっていたので
手を握って、ありがとうと一言だけ
伝えたら耳は聞こえているようで
父はボロボロ泣いていて
一緒に自分も泣いていました。

父の目の前で泣いたのも初めてですし
泣いた父を見たのも初めてでした

言えてよかったです

item.title: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。こ…
item.author: 田中貴子 (@takakotanaka.bsky.social)
item.description: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。
item.content:encoded: 三条木屋町にある瑞泉寺は、処刑された豊臣秀次の妻妾や子ども達を供養するために建立されたお寺。前は通るが入るのは初めて。ここがかつて鴨川の中洲であったことが記されている。とても案内が行き届いた寺院で、繁華街の中とは思えないほど静謐な雰囲気でした。

item.title: President Donald Trump on Friday pardoned Adam Kidan, a onet…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: President Donald Trump on Friday pardoned Adam Kidan, a onetime business partner of disgraced former lobbyist Jack Abramoff, and Jack Harvard, a former mayor in Texas.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump on Friday pardoned Adam Kidan, a onetime business partner of disgraced former lobbyist Jack Abramoff, and Jack Harvard, a former mayor in Texas.

item.title: When it comes to making AI-enabled robots, China and the U.S…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
When it comes to making AI-enabled robots, China and the U.S. are miles ahead of India.

But having the world’s second-largest workforce and relatively low labor costs has given India a unique advantage — it can provide the humans to train robots. cnb.cx/4arC1Uw
item.content:encoded:
When it comes to making AI-enabled robots, China and the U.S. are miles ahead of India.

But having the world’s second-largest workforce and relatively low labor costs has given India a unique advantage — it can provide the humans to train robots. cnb.cx/4arC1Uw

item.title: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な…
item.author: ぬまがさワタリ@『いきものニュース図解』ほか3/19同時発売 (@numagasa.bsky.social)
item.description: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう
item.content:encoded: 「Blueskyは自分を善良だと思いこんでいる意地悪な人の集まりだ」みたいな英語記事が話題のようで、このSNSに意地悪な人がいることは否定しないが、感じのいいナチスと、感じのいいナチスに意地悪な人なら、後者のほうが好きといえるだろう

item.title: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!
item.content:encoded: I watched Fireworks! The movie was 1h 30m long. This was an amazing movie 🥹 the story was intriguing, and it had a ton of magical and wondrous moments! The summer vibes they created were immaculate as well, and the art style was beautiful! It was an incredible experience, from beginning to end!

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 経産省、アバター国際規格発行を発表！ VTuberねむ委員コメント「日本発でアバターを規格化する意…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
経産省、アバター国際規格発行を発表！ VTuberねむ委員コメント「日本発でアバターを規格化する意義」

経産省、アバター国際規格発行を発表！ VTuberねむ委員コメント「日本発でアバターを規格化する意義」 コンピュータ・通信機器 経済産業省は2026年6月29日、日本発の「アバター」に関する国際規格「ISO/IEC 24216-1:2026」の発行を発表した。本規格はメタバースやXRにおける仮想の身体であるアバターを介した体験全般に...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
経産省、アバター国際規格発行を発表！ VTuberねむ委員コメント「日本発でアバターを規格化する意義」

経産省、アバター国際規格発行を発表！ VTuberねむ委員コメント「日本発でアバターを規格化する意義」 コンピュータ・通信機器 経済産業省は2026年6月29日、日本発の「アバター」に関する国際規格「ISO/IEC 24216-1:2026」の発行を発表した。本規格はメタバースやXRにおける仮想の身体であるアバターを介した体験全般に...

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “Washington was beloved by many …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“Washington was beloved by many for giving away power he could have kept. Trump is reviled by many for snatching power he isn’t entitled to,” our columnist Maureen Dowd writes. “One famously wouldn’t tell a lie. The other famously can’t stop telling lies.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“Washington was beloved by many for giving away power he could have kept. Trump is reviled by many for snatching power he isn’t entitled to,” our columnist Maureen Dowd writes. “One famously wouldn’t tell a lie. The other famously can’t stop telling lies.”

item.title: 夏美がギロロに風呂を誘うやつも叡智でしたよね。ちなみにこれは夏美本人ではなくスーツを着たケロン人なんですけどね。あれアニ…
item.author: やまだいおり🐮とうぱに新宿御苑 (@panicyamada.bsky.social)
item.description: 夏美がギロロに風呂を誘うやつも叡智でしたよね。ちなみにこれは夏美本人ではなくスーツを着たケロン人なんですけどね。あれアニメで流れてたってマ？
item.content:encoded: 夏美がギロロに風呂を誘うやつも叡智でしたよね。ちなみにこれは夏美本人ではなくスーツを着たケロン人なんですけどね。あれアニメで流れてたってマ？

item.title: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! T…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!
item.content:encoded: The MD Plus Project pack in Muse Dash is filled with bops! This is the track "Believing and Being" by hitogoto feat. ina, and it's tough 😤 the music is bumping, it has a dark sound to it that goes hard! The chart is super fun, the notes flow smoothly and are satisfying to hit! It's an awesome track!

item.title: A large group of masked men wearing clothing associated with…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A large group of masked men wearing clothing associated with a white supremacist group marched with flags and chanted in Washington on Saturday morning as the U.S. Capitol prepared for events celebrating the country's 250th birthday. nyti.ms/4p64lBR
item.content:encoded: A large group of masked men wearing clothing associated with a white supremacist group marched with flags and chanted in Washington on Saturday morning as the U.S. Capitol prepared for events celebrating the country's 250th birthday. nyti.ms/4p64lBR

item.title: not to get political, but America is real pretty and has a l…
item.author: Zack Bornstein (@zackbornstein.bsky.social)
item.description: not to get political, but America is real pretty and has a lot of nice folks making cool things, and i think if we had a president who wasn’t actively trying to murder us, we could have a pretty good time
item.content:encoded: not to get political, but America is real pretty and has a lot of nice folks making cool things, and i think if we had a president who wasn’t actively trying to murder us, we could have a pretty good time

item.title: Never let the cynics and naysayers grind you down. You *can*…
item.author: Tom Cox (@dj-acid-reflux.bsky.social)
item.description: Never let the cynics and naysayers grind you down. You *can* have it all at once.
item.content:encoded: Never let the cynics and naysayers grind you down. You *can* have it all at once.

item.title: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your pack…
item.author: gil, a finite mode (@gilmorejon.bsky.social)
item.description: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your packages, if all they find is big awful books about political philosophy they'll just quietly leave them by your apartment door a few days later anyway
item.content:encoded: here's a tip: when someone in your building steals your packages, if all they find is big awful books about political philosophy they'll just quietly leave them by your apartment door a few days later anyway

item.title: After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coa…
item.author: Man Incognito (@sjbrewer.bsky.social)
item.description:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.
item.content:encoded:
After Egypt's historic knockout win over Australia, head coach Hossam Hassan walked onto the pitch carrying a PALESTINE flag.

The Pharaohs advance, and their coach made sure the celebration carried a message the whole world saw.
